channel.title: Anto Subash - openid-connect
channel.description: Full-stack developer passionate about web technologies, microservices, and modern software development.

item.title: OpenID Connect with Next.js 15 and openid-client 6
item.description: A guide to implementing secure authentication using OpenID Connect in Next.js 15 with the openid-client library version 6

item.title: OpenID Connect with Next.js
item.description: In this post, we will see how to implement OpenID Connect with Next.js.
